title: Document and manually verify tickflow MVP
description: Add concise documentation for the MVP extension commands, architecture, limitations, and manual verification workflow. Include explicit note that shared workspace mode can conflict and worktree isolation is post-MVP.
acceptance_criteria: README or docs section explains /tickflow-contract, /tickflow-run-tick, /tickflow-run; manual verification steps are documented; limitations and follow-up work are captured in ticks.
closed_reason: Documented Tickflow MVP commands, architecture, supervisor outcomes, verifier inference, lease metadata, limitations, and manual verification steps in .pi/extensions/tickflow/README.md.
